name: project-delivery
description: A repository-grounded, risk-scaled workflow for planning, implementing, verifying, reviewing, releasing, and improving software changes.

interface.shortDescription: Take software work from idea to safe release
interface.longDescription: Project Delivery provides one coherent, repository-grounded lifecycle for clarifying requests, defining requirements, designing solutions, planning delivery, implementing changes, producing test evidence, updating canonical documentation, reviewing risk, preparing releases, and capturing improvements. It scales from documentation and small fixes to multi-PR, multi-release initiatives.
defaultPrompt: Clarify and plan this change at the right depth.
Deliver this feature with evidence and review gates.
Audit this change and prepare it for release.
